metadata.title: Tenant Context Leak Detection and Monitoring

story.iWant: monitoring and alerting for tenant context leaks
story.tasks: - AC1: Metrics emitted: tenant_context_missing, tenant_context_mismatch, cross_tenant_access_attempts - AC2: Security audit log for all tenant isolation violations - AC3: Structured JSON log includes: violation_type, user_id, attempted_tenant, actual_tenant, trace_id - AC4: Alerting rules configured in Prometheus for isolation violations - AC5: Dashboard query templates for tenant isolation monitoring - AC6: Integration test validates metrics are emitted on violations - AC7: Leak detection documented in docs/reference/security-monitoring.md

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. Metrics emitted: tenant_context_missing, tenant_context_mismatch, cross_tenant_access_attempts 2. Security audit log for all tenant isolation violations 3. Structured JSON log includes: violation_type, user_id, attempted_tenant, actual_tenant, trace_id 4. Alerting rules configured in Prometheus for isolation violations 5. Dashboard query templates for tenant isolation monitoring 6. Integration test validates metrics are emitted on violations 7. Leak detection documented in docs/reference/security-monitoring.md

doc.section: Section 16 - Tenant Leak Detection, Section 17 - Monitoring
doc.relevance: Monitoring and alerting strategy for tenant isolation violations
doc.snippet: Tenant Leak Detection and Monitoring: - Prometheus metrics: tenant_context_missing, tenant_context_mismatch, cross_tenant_access_attempts - Security audit log with structured JSON for SIEM integration - Log fields: violation_type, user_id, attempted_tenant, actual_tenant, trace_id, timestamp - Alerting rules: Immediate alert on any cross-tenant access attempt - Dashboard: Real-time tenant isolation monitoring - Integration with observability stack (Micrometer, Logback, OpenTelemetry)
FR005: Comprehensive observability with structured logging, metrics, and tracing. Security monitoring for tenant isolation violations. Real-time alerting for security incidents.

Story 3.9: Template Method Pattern for Metrics - MeteredTokenValidator base class with automatic instrumentation - Per-layer metrics automatically emitted (295x better than target) - Clean code, zero boilerplate, exceptional performance Apply same pattern to tenant leak detection for metrics emission.

Story 4.8: Tenant Context Leak Detection and Monitoring - Metrics: tenant_context_missing, tenant_context_mismatch, cross_tenant_access_attempts - Security audit log with structured JSON - Alerting rules in Prometheus for isolation violations - Dashboard query templates for monitoring

artifact.reason: Story 4.3 interceptor to be enhanced with metrics and security logging
Story 4.2 filter to emit metrics for missing tenant context
Epic 3 Story 3.9 Template Method Pattern for metrics
Epic 3 test pattern for metrics validation

constraints.constraint: Emit metrics at all tenant isolation enforcement points: - tenant_context_missing: TenantContextFilter (Layer 1), command interceptor (Layer 2) - tenant_context_mismatch: TenantValidationInterceptor (Layer 2) - cross_tenant_access_attempts: All layers when isolation violated Use Micrometer Counter for counts, Timer for latency tracking.

Security audit log for ALL tenant isolation violations (CWE-778 compliance). Structured JSON log with fields: violation_type, user_id, attempted_tenant, actual_tenant, trace_id, timestamp. Log level: WARN for violations (not ERROR - violations are expected attack attempts). Integration with SIEM via structured JSON format.

Prometheus alerting rules for tenant isolation violations: - Alert: TenantContextMissing (any missing context in production) - Alert: TenantContextMismatch (any mismatch attempt) - Alert: CrossTenantAccessAttempt (sustained attack pattern: >10 attempts/min) Severity: Critical (immediate investigation required).

Grafana dashboard query templates for tenant isolation monitoring: - Panel: Tenant isolation violation rate (per tenant, per time period) - Panel: Top violators (user_id with most violation attempts) - Panel: Violation types breakdown (missing, mismatch, cross-tenant) Real-time monitoring for security operations center (SOC).
Do NOT log sensitive data in violation logs (CWE-209 protection). Generic messages: "Access denied: tenant context mismatch" Log tenant IDs (not PII) for security analysis, not user details.

interface.name: Tenant Isolation Metrics
interface.description: Micrometer metrics for tenant isolation monitoring. Counters for violation counts, timers for validation latency.
interface.metrics: tenant_context_missing (Counter) - Count of missing tenant context violations tenant_context_mismatch (Counter) - Count of tenant context mismatch violations cross_tenant_access_attempts (Counter) - Count of cross-tenant access attempts tenant_validation_duration (Timer) - Latency of tenant validation operations

interface.name: Security Audit Logging
interface.description: Structured JSON security audit log for tenant isolation violations. Integration with SIEM via Logback JSON encoder.
interface.pattern: logger.warn( StructuredArguments.kv("event_type", "tenant_isolation_violation"), StructuredArguments.kv("violation_type", "context_mismatch"), StructuredArguments.kv("user_id", userId), StructuredArguments.kv("attempted_tenant", command.tenantId), StructuredArguments.kv("actual_tenant", currentTenant), StructuredArguments.kv("trace_id", traceId), "Access denied: tenant context mismatch" )

interface.name: Prometheus Alerting Rules
interface.description: Prometheus alerting rules for tenant isolation violations. Configuration in prometheus.yml or alerting rules file.
interface.pattern:
groups: - name: tenant_isolation_alerts rules: - alert: TenantContextMismatch expr: rate(tenant_context_mismatch_total[5m]) > 0 for: 1m labels: severity: critical annotations: summary: "Tenant context mismatch detected" description: "{{ $value }} tenant context mismatches in last 5 minutes"
- alert: CrossTenantAccessAttempt expr: rate(cross_tenant_access_attempts_total[1m]) > 10 for: 2m labels: severity: critical annotations: summary: "Sustained cross-tenant access attempts" description: "{{ $value }} cross-tenant access attempts per minute"

standards.standard: Constitutional TDD: Integration test validates metrics emitted on violations. Test BEFORE implementing metrics instrumentation.
Use TestMeterRegistry pattern from Epic 3 for metrics validation. Verify counter increments, timer recordings on violation scenarios. Pattern: TestMeterRegistry + Kotest assertions.
Validate structured JSON log contains all required fields. Parse JSON log output, verify violation_type, user_id, tenant IDs, trace_id. Use Logback test appender or log capture for validation.
Reuse Story 4.7 tenant isolation test scenarios. Enhance tests to validate metrics and logging on violations. Verify metrics emitted for all 3 layers of isolation.

ideas.idea: Test AC1: Verify tenant_context_missing counter incremented on missing context
Test AC1: Verify tenant_context_mismatch counter incremented on mismatch
Test AC1: Verify cross_tenant_access_attempts counter incremented on cross-tenant attempt
Test AC2: Security audit log emitted on tenant isolation violation
Test AC3: Structured JSON log includes all required fields (violation_type, user_id, tenants, trace_id)
Test AC3: Parse JSON log output, validate field values
Test AC6: Integration test - trigger violation → verify metrics incremented
Test AC6: Integration test - Layer 1 violation → missing context metric
Test AC6: Integration test - Layer 2 violation → mismatch metric
Test AC6: Integration test - Layer 3 violation → cross-tenant access metric
Test metrics emission performance: <1ms overhead for instrumentation
Test concurrent violations → metrics accurate under load
Test log rotation and retention (7-day target from Epic 5)
